CHECKLIST 4 - ELEMENTS OF HIGH-CONVERTING EMAILS
ELEMENTS OF HIGH-CONVERTING
EMAILS
Creative subject line (hook)
Creative “From”
name (optional)
Compelling first
sentence/opener
Delivery on the hook at least
in top 25% of the copy

3	Stefan Georgi
CHECKLIST 4 - ELEMENTS OF HIGH-CONVERTING EMAILS
1 clear CTA,
no more than 2 links
Every line of copy
has a purpose
Hyperlink relevant sentences,
not just ‘click here’
Include OPTIONAL
discount/promo codes
if sales promo
